summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DataEntry Hub v2. Fixed critical backend bug in create_sale endpoint (duplicate discount kwarg). Fixed critical frontend bug with SelectItem empty value props. All backend APIs pass (26/26), frontend navigation and CRUD operations working.

critical.issue: FIXED - TypeError: Sale() got multiple values for keyword argument 'discount'. The sale_data.model_dump() already includes discount, but it was also explicitly set.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - SelectItem with empty string value '' caused runtime error. Empty string is not allowed in Radix Select.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error about <tr> inside <span> - likely React/DevTools injection, not functional issue
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Dashboard stats endpoint with correct structure
All navigation links present (Dashboard, Sales, Branches, Customers, Suppliers, Supplier Payments, Expenses, Reports, Credit Report, Supplier Report, Category Report)
Sale add with split payment via UI
action_items: Users page testing skipped - test@example.com has 'operator' role, not 'admin'. Need admin user to test user management
Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /app/backend/server.py line 658 - create_sale was passing discount twice via model_dump() and explicit kwarg
Fixed: SelectItem value='' in CustomersPage.jsx, SuppliersPage.jsx, UsersPage.jsx - empty string not allowed in Radix Select

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load, CRUD works, Users page requires admin)

seed_data_creation: Created test data: 1 customer (Test UI Customer), 1 supplier (Test UI Supplier with $5000 credit limit), 1 expense ($75.50 office supplies), 1 sale ($100 cash with $10 discount)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API fully functional with 26/26 tests passing. Fixed create_sale endpoint bug. Fixed SelectItem empty value bugs in 3 frontend pages. All CRUD operations verified. test@example.com is operator role - cannot test Users page (admin only). Console shows hydration warnings from React DevTools - not functional issues.

bug_1.description: create_sale TypeError: multiple values for keyword argument 'discount'
bug_1.root_cause: In /app/backend/server.py create_sale function, sale_data.model_dump() already includes 'discount' field, but discount was also explicitly passed to Sale() constructor
bug_1.fix: Added sale_data_dict.pop('discount', None) before passing to Sale() constructor

bug_2.description: SelectItem runtime error - empty string value not allowed
bug_2.root_cause: Radix UI Select component does not allow empty string '' as SelectItem value - it's reserved for clearing selection
bug_2.fix: Changed value='' to value='all' or value='none' with conversion logic in onValueChange handler
